questions.question: A gamer's scores in a video game are $12, 15, 18, 20, 15$. What is the mode?
A coding challenge has the following completion times (in minutes): $25, 30, 28, 32, 30$. What is the median time?
The data usage (in GB) for a gaming app is $2.5, 3.2, 2.8, 3.5, 2.5$. What is the mean usage?
A tech company's employee salaries (in thousands) are $50, 60, 70, 80, 50$. Which measure of central tendency is most appropriate for this data set?
The high scores for a game are $1000, 1200, 1100, 1300, 1000$. If the game is updated, which measure of central tendency would be most affected?
A set of gaming laptops has the following prices (in dollars): $1000, 1200, 1100, 1300, 1000$. Which laptop price is the mode?
The download times for a game patch (in seconds) are $15, 20, 18, 22, 20$. What is the median download time?
A set of data about CPU usage (in percent) is $25, 30, 28, 32, 30$. Which measure of central tendency would best describe the data set?

A gaming tournament has the following scores: $200, 250, 300, 200, 350$. Calculate the mean, median, and mode. Compare these measures of central tendency and explain which one is most appropriate for this data set.
The response times (in milliseconds) for a gaming server are $50, 60, 55, 65, 50$. Calculate the mean, median, and mode for this data set. Interpret the results in the context of gaming performance.

teacher_rules: Ensure students understand the context of tech and gaming when solving problems.
Emphasize the importance of choosing the correct measure of central tendency for a given data set.
Remind students to show all calculations and explain their reasoning for free-response questions.
